commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
This PR changes the bundled MiniMax music provider to request streaming hex responses, decode SSE/audio frames into an MP3 asset, keep JSON URL/inline fallbacks, add provider tests, and add a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. The current-main failure path is source-reproducible from the 120s default POST timeout and the linked issue/proof supplies live MiniMax timeout evidence; the PR-specific regression is source-reproducible from the timeout helper contract.
commands.review_followup: Automerge should pause for one narrow mechanical repair: preserve explicit MiniMax music timeout values above 300s and add focused coverage before merge.

target.title: fix(minimax): stream music generation responses
target.body:
